title: Loading Backgrounds - Structures
description: This resourcepack is a perfect complement to the Loading Backgrounds mod, since it takes care of adding loading images related to the structures.
body:
![banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds_Resourcepacks/MP_LoadingBackgrounds_LoadingImages_header.webp) This resourcepack is a perfect complement to the Loading Backgrounds mod, since it takes care of adding loading images related to the structures. The images are a compilation of the default Minecraft structures, and those added by other mods, and have been taken with shaders to make them look great on the loading background. **[Requires the mod: Loading Backgrounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/loading-backgrounds)** ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds/BH_LB_banner1.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![screenshots 1](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds_Resourcepacks/MP_LoadingBackgrounds_Structures_screenshot1.webp) ![screenshots 2](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Loading_Backgrounds_Resourcepacks/MP_LoadingBackgrounds_Structures_screenshot1.webp) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
